name: Was It Just a Coincidence... or Fate?
overview:
Driven to the edge by a life falling apart, Ha-yun makes a desperate choice: selling herself to Jun-hyeok, the man she has secretly loved for years. To her, it’s a heartbreaking end to her unspoken crush, but to him, she’s just a "bought woman" to be toyed with and humiliated.

However, once her true identity is revealed, his cold-blooded contempt ignites into a dangerous, dark obsession. Now, he refuses to let her go. Can they survive the twisted fate sparked by secrets and raw desire?

trailers.title: New k-drama trailer dropped! 【선배님, 모두 우연인가요】| Darling，Is It All Coincidence
